implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Baseline captured before each task invocation
Git-detected file counts reflect only per-task changes
First task in worktree reports correct file counts
Logging shows baseline vs delta counts

completion_promises.criterion_text: Baseline captured before each task invocation (both task-work and direct paths)
completion_promises.evidence: Added _baseline_state attribute to AgentInvoker.__init__. _record_baseline() now calls _snapshot_worktree_state() to capture file-level snapshot. Baseline is captured in invoke_player() via the existing _record_baseline() call at line 1720-1721, which is invoked before both task-work and direct SDK paths.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Git-detected file counts reflect only per-task changes, not cumulative feature changes
completion_promises.evidence: _detect_git_changes() now computes delta by subtracting baseline state (sets of modified/created files) from current git state. This ensures only files changed since the task's baseline are reported, not cumulative changes from all tasks in the shared worktree.

_detect_git_changes() now returns delta-computed results. The union logic in _create_player_report_from_task_work (line 3809-3812) merges task_work_results data with the delta from _detect_git_changes(), which is correct since delta represents only per-task changes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report uses delta instead of raw git state
completion_promises.evidence: _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report() calls _detect_git_changes() which now returns delta-computed results. No additional changes needed to this method since it already delegates to _detect_git_changes().

completion_promises.criterion_text: First task in worktree still reports correct file counts
completion_promises.evidence: When _baseline_state has empty sets (first task), delta = current - empty = current. Test TestDetectGitChangesDelta::test_delta_first_task_full_state verifies this behavior.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests verify delta computation with mock git state
completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/unit/test_agent_invoker_git_delta.py with 13 tests covering: snapshot creation, raw detection, delta subtraction for modified/created files, empty delta when no changes, full state when no baseline, sorted results, baseline state capture, and end-to-end shared worktree scenarios.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Logging shows baseline vs delta counts for observability
completion_promises.evidence: Added logger.info() call in _detect_git_changes() with format: f'Git detection: baseline={len(baseline_modified)}+{len(baseline_created)}, delta={len(delta_modified)}+{len(delta_created)}'. Also added logging in _record_baseline() for baseline state capture.
